dir.code: so_the_ts, ngay_ct, ma_nv, ky, nam, ma_tg_ts
dir.order: so_the_ts, ngay_ct, ma_nv, ky, nam, ma_tg_ts

command.text: declare @dv_yn bit, @referenceName nvarchar(512), @$type int select @$type = loai_tg_ts from dmtgts where ma_tg_ts = @ma_tg_ts select @$type = isnull(@$type, 1) select @referenceName = ten_ts%l, @dv_yn = case when ma_dvcs = @@unit then 1 else 0 end from &FixedAssetTable; where so_the_ts = @so_the_ts if @@action = 'Edit' begin declare @so_ky_kh numeric(20, 5), @gt_cl numeric(20, 5), @gt_cl_nt numeric(20, 5) select @so_ky_kh = so_ky_kh, @gt_cl = gt_cl, @gt_cl_nt = gt_cl_nt from @@table where so_the_ts = @so_the_ts and ngay_ct = @ngay_ct and ma_nv = @ma_nv and ky = @ky and nam = @nam and ma_tg_ts = @ma_tg_ts &CreateStructureAndExecute; select @referenceName as ten_ts%l, @dv_yn as dv_yn, @$type as loai_tg_ts, _02 as tang_giam, _02_nt as tang_giam_nt from #t return end select @referenceName as ten_ts%l, @dv_yn as dv_yn, @$type as loai_tg_ts return

declare @$exists nvarchar(512), @$recordHasBeenChanged nvarchar(512), @$period nvarchar(512) select @$exists = case when @@language = 'v' then N'Thông tin điều chỉnh tài sản đang cập nhật đã được khai báo, không lưu được.' else N'This item already exists, it can not be saved.' end select @$recordHasBeenChanged = case when @@language = 'v' then N'Bản ghi hiện thời đã được sửa hoặc xóa bởi người sử dụng khác.' else N'This item has been modified or deleted by another user.' end

&CommandCheckLockedDate;
if exists(select * from @@table where so_the_ts = @so_the_ts and ngay_ct = @ngay_ct and ma_nv = @ma_nv and ky = @ky and nam = @nam and ma_tg_ts = @ma_tg_ts) begin select 'ngay_ct' as field, @$exists as message return end select @datetime0 = getdate(), @datetime2 = getdate(), @user_id0 = @@userID, @user_id2 = @@userID

&CommandCheckLockedDate;
if not exists(select * from @@table where so_the_ts = $so_the_ts.OldValue and ngay_ct = $ngay_ct.OldValue and ma_nv = $ma_nv.OldValue and ky = $ky.OldValue and nam = $nam.OldValue and ma_tg_ts = $ma_tg_ts.OldValue) begin select 'so_the_ts' as field, @$recordHasBeenChanged as message return end
if @so_the_ts <> $so_the_ts.OldValue or @ngay_ct <> $ngay_ct.OldValue or @ma_nv <> $ma_nv.OldValue or @ky <> $ky.OldValue or @nam <> $nam.OldValue or @ma_tg_ts <> $ma_tg_ts.OldValue begin if exists(select * from @@table where (not (so_the_ts = $so_the_ts.OldValue and ngay_ct = $ngay_ct.OldValue and ma_nv = $ma_nv.OldValue and ky = $ky.OldValue and nam = $nam.OldValue and ma_tg_ts = $ma_tg_ts.OldValue)) and (so_the_ts = @so_the_ts and ngay_ct = @ngay_ct and ma_nv = @ma_nv and ky = @ky and nam = @nam and ma_tg_ts = @ma_tg_ts)) begin
select 'so_the_ts' as field, @$exists as message return end end
update @@table set datetime2 = getdate(), user_id2 = @@userID where so_the_ts = @so_the_ts and ngay_ct = @ngay_ct and ma_nv = @ma_nv and ky = @ky and nam = @nam and ma_tg_ts = @ma_tg_ts

action.text: if exists(select 1 from &FixedAssetTable; where so_the_ts = @so_the_ts and ma_dvcs = @@unit) begin select rtrim(a.ma_nt) as ma_nt, b.ten_nt%l, a.ty_gia from &FixedAssetTable; a left join dmnt b on a.ma_nt = b.ma_nt where a.so_the_ts = @so_the_ts return end

if exists(select 1 from dmtgts where ma_tg_ts = @ma_tg_ts) begin declare @loai_tg_ts int select @so_ky_kh = 0, @loai_tg_ts = loai_tg_ts from dmtgts where ma_tg_ts = @ma_tg_ts if @action = 'New' select @ngay_ct = null &CreateStructureAndExecute; select isnull(@loai_tg_ts, 1) as loai_tg_ts, * from #t return end
if @action = 'New' select @ngay_ct = null if (@ky > 0 and @ky < 13 and @nam > 0) &ExecuteAdjustForm;
